title: add brands table and foreign key constraints (Audit Phase 2)
description:
## Summary

- Adds a `brands` lookup table (id, slug, display_name) to the shared-db schema so that multi-tenant data (mentolder / korczewski) is tracked with a proper FK instead of raw string columns.
- Introduces FK constraints in `website-db.ts` and `tickets-db.ts` referencing the new `brands` table.
- Updates `k3d/website-schema.yaml` with the new table and FK migrations.
- Patches `arena-server/src/db/migrations/0001_init.sql` and `deploy/tracking/init.sql` to seed/reference the brands table on their respective schemas.
- Updates `docs/db-schema-diagram.md` and `k3d/docs-content/db-schema.md` to reflect the new 104-table schema.
- Adjusts test files (`website-db.test.ts`, `coaching-db.test.ts`, `coaching-session-db.test.ts`, `knowledge-db.test.ts`) to satisfy the new FK constraints in test fixtures.

**Files changed:** `website/src/lib/website-db.ts`, `website/src/lib/tickets-db.ts`, `k3d/website-schema.yaml`, `arena-server/src/db/migrations/0001_init.sql`, `deploy/tracking/init.sql`, `docs/db-schema-diagram.md`, `k3d/docs-content/db-schema.md`, `k3d/migrations-arena.yaml`, `scripts/db-schema-diagram.py`, and associated test files.

## Test plan

- [ ] `task test:unit` passes locally (BATS + schema validation)
- [ ] `task test:manifests` shows no kustomize regressions
- [ ] `task workspace:validate` dry-run passes
- [ ] `task workspace:psql ENV=mentolder -- website` — verify `brands` table exists and FK constraints are live after deploy
- [ ] Website and arena-server pods restart cleanly (`task workspace:status ENV=mentolder`)
